allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add product filters and supermarket selection

- Add FilterBar component with filters for supermarket, offers, favorites, and category
- Add useProductFilters hook for filter state management with localStorage persistence
- Enable supermarket selection per product in price comparison view
- Show supermarket badge with best price \(star\) and sale \(tag\) icons
- Make favorites section horizontally scrollable
- Add blue background to add product form for visual separation
- Auto-select supermarket when choosing a product suggestion
- Close price details when clicking outside

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
